subcodes.first_line: O true friends and steadfast ones in the Covenant! The dawn of the Covenant is bright with radiant light, and the Witness of the Covenant is a lamp [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران حقیقی و ثابتان بر پیمان فجر میثاق بنور اشراق روشن و شاهد پیمان شمع
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @divine emanation is ceaseless; eternal, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
